title: Fantasy starter (EN)
background: A small border town where rumors of an ancient seal breaking draw unlikely allies together.
outline_hint: Act 1: arrival and uneasy alliances; Act 2: descent into ruins; Act 3: choice that reshapes the region.

character_personality.Alden: A pragmatic scout who hides guilt with dry humor.
character_personality.Mira: A scholar-mage who trusts evidence over prophecy.
character_personality.Brother Sol: A calm healer whose faith is shaken by forbidden relics.
